prompts.text: Create a player that moves through a maze like Pac-man using the left stick. It moves through 'empty' tiles and pickups but stops at 'wall' tiles. Dies when it hits an enemy.
Create an enemy that moves randomly through a maze like a Pac-man ghost. It moves through 'empty' tiles but stops at 'wall' tiles.
Create a stationary object that can be picked up by the player.  Is removed when it collides with the player.
